response.step_by_step_log: The video consistently displayed 'Ridin'on Dreams' in the center of the screen, which was identified as the event theme song title. The artist 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' was identified via web search for this song. The search query '"Ridin'on Dreams" hololive lyrics' was used to find the Japanese lyrics and English translations. The entire video from 00:00 to 04:12 features the same vocal song.
response.global_summary: The video is a tribute montage consisting of a slideshow of fan messages for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin'on Dreams' concert, followed by a shot of the audience at the concert venue, all accompanied by the event's theme song, 'Ridin'on Dreams' by the hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: The video plays the hololive IDOL PROJECT song 'Ridin'on Dreams' throughout the slideshow of fan messages and the subsequent audience shot, with the title 'Ridin'on Dreams' visible in the center of the screen throughout the slideshow.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！Ridin' on Dreams
Yeah！！ Wow oh oh…
Hey！！ (Hey！！)
Hey！！ (Hey！！)
Yeah！！
あぁ 小さな夢から 想像できないような
想いになったんだ わくわく止まらない！
何度迷ったって僕ら
絆が舵になる
ちょっとくらい怖くても大丈夫
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because you were there
Hey, I want to say "thank you" over and over again
I want to tell you right now
Let's get on board! Ridin' on Dreams
Yeah!! Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!)
Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!
Ah, from a small dream, it became a feeling I couldn't have imagined
I can't stop being excited!
No matter how many times we get lost
Our bond becomes the rudder
Even if it's a little scary, it's okay
